hero.title: How Would You Like It Washed?
hero.subtitle: Choose your experience

standard.title: Standard Wash
standard.desc: Our signature 48-hour service with gentle cleaning, eco detergents, and basic folding.

express.title: Express Wash
express.desc: Need it fast? Get 24-hour turnaround, priority processing, and premium care.

fragrances.title: Akoya Signature Fragrances
fragrances.subtitle: Premium scents crafted to elevate your laundry experience

maknoun.name: Maknoun
maknoun.desc: A luxurious fragrance that embodies charm with fresh fruits, florals, and a warm musk base.

mad.name: Mad
mad.desc: A powerful masculine fragrance blending saffron, jasmine, incense and amber leather base.

lulwa.name: Lulwa
lulwa.desc: Radiant feminine fragrance blending bergamot, ginger, patchouli and soft musk.

sadf.name: Sadf
sadf.desc: A refreshing fragrance with citrus, ginger and ambergris for an elegant finish.

packaging.title: Plastic Wrap
packaging.desc: Crystal-clear protective wrapping with our embossed gold seal for discreet luxury.
